MV FAREAST HARMONY - OPEN : AQABA, JORDAN 02/08 JAN
DWT 56,756 MT / 2012 BLT
No RUSSIA/UKRAINE/IRAN/ISRAEL/USA
BOD VLSFO ABT 850-950MT/ LSMGO ABT 120MT
PRESENT CARGO : STEELS & GEN
PREF : SE.ASIA / FAR EAST DIRECTION
===
MV FAREAST HARMONY
BLT 2012, FLAG HK, CLASS DNV
DWT 56,756MT ON 12.818M SSW, TPC 58.8
5HO/5HA,
CRANES 4 X 30MT SWL (GRAB WORKING: SWL 22MT)
GRABS 4 X (5-12) CBM SWL 11MT
LOA 189.99M / BEAM 32.26M
GRT 33,042/NRT 19,132
GRAIN 71,634CBM / BALE 68200CBM
CONTANT EXCLUDING DEAD BALLAST WATER : ABT 500MT
DEAD BALLAST WATER : ABT 300MT
TANK TOP FLAT FLOOR DIMENTION LENGTH X BREADTH (FORE-AFT)
H1: 27.88 X (10.706-23.82)M
H2: 28.70 X 23.82M
H3: 27.06 X 23.82M
H4: 28.70 X 23.82M
H5: 27.06 X (23.82 - 9.066)M
HATCH COVER DIMENTION (LENGTH X BREADTH):
H1: 18.86 X 18.26M;  H2-H5: 21.32 X 18.26M
TANKTOP STRENGTH: H1/H3/H5: 25 MT/SQM; H2/H4: 20 MT/SQM
ON DECK/HATCH ABT 1.75MT/SQM
FRESH WATER MIN RESERVE: ABT 300MT, VSL MAY RESERVE ABT 400MT ADDITIONAL BALLAST WATER FOR BWTS PURPOSE INCASE PORT WATER DENSITY LESS 1.01
SPEED & CONSUMPTION AT SEA:
LADEN ABT 11.5 KNOTS/ BALLAST ABT 12.0KTS ON VLSFO ABT 23.7MT + LSMGO ABT 0.2MT
IN PORT:
IDLING VLSFO ABT 3.5MT + LSMGO ABT 0.2MT
WORKING VLSFO ABT 5.3MT + LSMGO ABT 0.2MT
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION ARE BASIS GOOD WEATHER DAY CONDITION OF 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS FROM NOON TO NOON WITH SMOOTH SEA MAXIMUM BEAUFORT SCALE 4, DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3, WITH SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT MAX 1.25M, WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE SWELL, SAILING W/I SUMMER DRAFT AND NO DECK CARGO ON EVEN KEEL IN STILL AND DEEP WATER, SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY, EXCLUDING SEA PASSAGE DURATION LESS THAN 48HOURS, AND SAILING IN CANALS, STRAITS, NARROWS, RESTRICTED WATERS, SAILING WITH PILOT AND WHEN ASSISTING A VESSEL IN DISTRESS OR WHEN SAVING OR ATTEMPTING TO SAVE LIFE OR PROPERTY AT SEA AND PERIODS WHEN SPEED IS REDUCED/ADJUSTED DUE TO CHARTERERS’ ORDER, REASONS OF SAFETY AND POOR VISIBILITY, ETC ARE EXCLUDED.
ABOUT MEANS 0.5KNOTS DOWNWARD IN THE SPEED AND 5% UPWARD IN THE CONSUMPTION BOTH APPLICABLE JOINTLY IN OWNER\'S FAVOR.
VESSEL MAY USE EXTRA BUNKER (ABT FO 2.0-2.5MT PER DAY) WHILE BALLASTING & DEBALLASTING. VESSEL HAS LIBERTY OF USING EXTRA
DO WHILE MANEUVERING IN AND OUT OF PORTS, IN SHALLOW/NARROW/RESTRICTED/BUSY WATERS, STRAITS, CANALS, RIVERS, DURING BAD WEATHER/COLD WEATHER. WHILE MAKING PERFORMANCE EVALUATION, IT’S NOT ALLOWED EXTRAPOLATION OF GOOD WEATHER PERIOD FOR ANY EXCLUDED PERIOD.
THE ACTUAL ROUTE TAKEN BY THE VESSEL SHALL BE USED AS THE BASIS OF VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE EVALUATION. POSITIVE CURRENTS WORK IN OWNER’S FAVOR. THE BUNKER SAVINGS TO OFFSET TIME LOST AND VICE VERSA. THE FO SAVINGS TO OFFSET DO OVER-CONSUMED AND VICE VERSA.
WHILE SAILING W/I ECA USING LSMGO FOR MAIN EGINE, FUEL CONSUMPION MAYBE ADDED ABT 1MT/DAY MORE.
ALL DETAILS ABT WOG
